chunks.text: Jessica Boles wins IEEE Power Electronics Prize Letter Award - EECS at Berkeley EECS Assistant Professor Jessica Boles has won the 2023 IEEE Transactions on Power Electronics (TPEL) Power Electronics Prize Letter Award for her groundbreaking paper, “A Piezoelectric-Resonator-Based DC-DC Converter Demonstrating 1 kW/cm^3 Resonator Power Density.” TPEL is the leading journal in power electronics. The paper by Boles, Bonavia, Lang, and Perreault was one of only two selected papers out of 192 published in 2023. Boles’ research focuses on power electronic circuits, components, control, and related applications.
